params._dataHash: Hash of the data for verification
SHA-256 hash of the full off-chain data
params._ipfsCid: IPFS CID where the full data is stored

verifyChainIntegrity(string).details: Returns the total records and latest hash for chain verification.

recordCompressedData(string,uint8,bytes3.notice: Record compressed data directly on-chain (small payloads only).

recordData(string,uint8,bytes32,string).notice: Record agent data on-chain (hash-only, with IPFS CID for full data).

verifyChainIntegrity(string).notice: Verify the integrity of an agent's data chain.
